transcript.text: Erik, where are you located at?
It's a little slower, but it's a nice hiatus from the city life.

Yeah, I drove to Chicago one year from the South, so I live in Charlotte, so I made like a drive just to kind of go see, you know, America and have family up in Chicago, and I was quite surprised kind of going up in that route that it's mostly farmland going all the way up into Chicago, so it's like pretty much cornfields and then a giant city out of nowhere, so.
Yeah, we've got quite a bit of farm field around the city.
Indiana, Wisconsin above us, and then Southern Illinois is basically all farmland.
So he's shadowing for now, but we'll throw him in the deep end soon.
I was not at any of them, so.
I talked to Kyle a little yesterday, Matt, about Udemy, and I know you dropped in some notes, but it sounds like we're still defining the lanes there.
I'm reworking the artifacts now to, like, skew towards their business side, because we think that's going to be, like, just...
The most manageable way for us to narrow something down, and then we're aiming to get those artifacts over to Robert today, later on.
So once Carl's online, I'm going to try and sync with him quickly to go through them, because they want to have a look at something.
But yeah, like, they want to have a look at something, but also we still need a bit more from them.
So I think Carl's setting up another deep dive with someone in their content team.
It's a big company, so there's different, like, there's different people we need to speak to and trying to figure out exactly who that is.
So yeah, artifacts today over to them, and then hopefully a bit more direction as Carl does the deep dive, and then as we sync with them this week.
So for Ambient, Sydney is a little sick still, but she's going to be working on their strategy today.
I asked her to let me know if I can fill in in any way, so I'll keep you posted, but that's the update.
So Joe and Simran are meeting today to discuss just how they're going to divide the strategy work.
We have the initial, like, bones, but they just need to divide, like, decide how they're going to do the keyword research.
I know that, Simran, this is important.
I some comments in the strategy doc just now, so it'll be helpful to review those with Joe as you develop the strategy.
I think Matt's working on the calibration block.
be able to get it to you, if not like this evening, then tomorrow morning, Aida, all morning tomorrow.
I am, I've just generated like 40-ish assignments for them.
So I'm going to upload those into the content OS.
And then we can present that to them when we meet later this week.
Joe has selected the blogs and the refreshes that we're going to be doing this week.
So we have, you know, Matt has his work, like he knows what he's going to be working on for Outreach this week.
And I think that's about it.
So there's one that Joe was talking about last night that were, I think she was asking me to do it, but I guess you've done it, which is great.
So she tagged you in the message in the external channel.
So there are three net new articles and two content refreshes.
No, I meant, sorry, I meant the assignment generation specifically, like adding, like cleaning up the OS.
I don't about cleaning up the OS, I have to take a look at it now, but I did generate like assignments.
I'm not sure if that overlaps with what Joe was talking about.
Oh, just because I can't remember the exact conversation right now.
We're going to ghost write a message that Dig can send to, I forget the person's name, but whoever's above Mahati.
I know we're blocked on both of them.
That was why I was thinking about this.
I mean, I need to, I'm going to send a message to Tyler today just to see how things are going.
And if they have come to any type of...
Resolution with their, just the way that, you know, they're doing things internally and how that impacts our engagement.
In the meantime, Aude can start working on the five refreshes for this week.
They're in the assignments tab, Aude.
They're the five remaining refreshes in the assignments tab.
Uh, Marisol's gonna, we're gonna go write a message to Mahadi's boss, whose name I can't remember.
I mean, we're meeting them tomorrow, so it's, it will be helpful.
Uh, yeah, Dig was out yesterday, but she's back today, so, uh, Dig, you on this call?
Uh, we'll reach out to you right after this.
And Okta, we don't have anybody search.
Just really quickly regarding Diligent, just to confirm, so it's Jen and Megan that are taking over?
Okay, so have they been notified or should I just reach out to them and set up a call?
So, yeah, we'll set something up.
Well, that was super quick, but yeah, let me know.
Oh, Joe, I also did the Tavern Scrunch dashboard, so.
Joe's, I think, running an errand, but good to know.
Simran, so the understory artifacts, you can tag me and Sydney when they're done today, so we can both take a look since Sydney is sick.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Daily strategy sprint standup to discuss project updates and next steps across multiple client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New team member Erik O'Brien introduced; currently shadowing](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Multiple client kickoffs completed successfully](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Project-specific updates shared for Udemy, Ambient, Clerk, Tamron, Outreach, Diligent, and Sentinel-1](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Team adjusting to staff changes and illness, redistributing tasks accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Topics

### Team Introduction

  - [Erik O'Brien, new team member, introduced](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Located in Iowa, recently moved from Chicago](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Currently shadowing the team before full integration](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Udemy Project Update

  - [Matt reworking artifacts to focus on Udemy's business side](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Aiming to send artifacts to Robert today](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Carl setting up deep dive with Udemy's content team](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Challenge: Navigating large company structure to find right contacts](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Ambient Project Status

  - [Sydney (ill) working on strategy today](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Aida on standby to assist if needed](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### Clerk Project Planning

  - [Joe and Simran meeting to divide strategy work](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Initial framework in place; focusing on keyword research division](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Alex left comments in strategy doc for review](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Tamron Project Progress

  - [Expected delivery: this evening or tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Outreach Project Developments

  - [Joe selected blogs and refreshes for the week](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Diligent and Sentinel-1 Projects

### Miscellaneous Updates

  - [Aida to contact Tyler regarding Diligent project internal resolutions](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Aude to start on 5 content refreshes for Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Simran to complete and tag Aida and Sydney on Understory artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aida to set up call with Jen and Megan for Diligent project handover](https://fathom.video/share/tQWoRG_AeCYwLsW295JFyG3NquhyZJfh?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

action_items.description: Rework Udemy artifacts for business side focus. Sync w/ Carl. Send to Robert today.
Upload 40 generated Outreach assignments to content OS. Prep for later week mtg.
Msg Tyler (Diligent) re: internal changes impact on engagement. Status update.
Start 5 Diligent content refreshes. See assignments tab for details.
Await msg from Andi re: ghostwriting for Mahati's boss (Drew). Post-call action.
Complete understory artifacts. Tag Aida & Sydney for review when done today.
